array.string: LAST_BACKUP=$(cat ~/.hermes/hermescopy-last-backup 2>/dev/null || echo "0") TODAY=$(date +%Y%m%d) if [ "$LAST_BACKUP" != "$TODAY" ]; then cd ~/Projects/hermescopy && echo "y" | ./hermescopy-backup.sh > /tmp/hermescopy-backup.log 2>&1 echo "$TODAY" > ~/.hermes/hermescopy-last-backup fi
